metadata.description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins: skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for everyday development workflows.

plugins.name: base
plugins.description: Opinionated general dev workflow baseline: feature speccing, bug reporting, team-based feature planning, a QA verification gate, issue-closing PR shipping, and a destructive-git + secrets-read safety net.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: Stack-neutral Python standards: path-scoped coding & testing judgment skills, plus changed-file lint/type/test gates on stop that run your repo's own ruff / pyrefly|mypy / pytest.
